title: container_validate.go: HostAdd (AddHost=) fails even when target Network= .container netns has identical AddHost= config
body:
### Feature request description

I'm running a rootless podman quadlet setup where a drop-in `container.d` file defines multiple `AddHost=xyz.tld` for all quadlets.

I changed one of my quadlets to join the netns of another quadlet by using `Network=target.container `

It failed to start:

`Error: invalid config provided: cannot set extra host entries when the container is joined to another containers network namespace: invalid configuration`

This is from `container_validate.go`:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/1492cea16e08df16417c5256ac82e7bc442a2c2e/pkg/specgen/container_validate.go#L41-L45

### Suggest potential solution

Give that the `AddHost=` are identical in both quadlets ideally for my case it should simply be ignored. 

### Workarounds

Another drop-in file overwriting `AddHost=` works as expected.



```bash
$ podman info
```

comments.body: nvm. given that systemd native workaround actually works (I failed to achieve this somehow in my earlier testing) this issue is mostly pointless.
